subcodes.first_line: O Ja'far! Hearken unto My call from the direction of the Prison, and make thine ear a receptacle that thou mayest hear the sweetest melodies from [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا جعفر اسمع ندائی عن جهه السجن ثم اجعل کلک اذنا لتسمع نغمات الاحلی عن
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @praise and encouragement, @naming of children; of individuals
